description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a pixelated, blocky design reminiscent of digital or voxel art, featuring a broad, double-edged blade that is predominantly light blue with subtle gradient shading. The blade is symmetrical and tapers to a pointed tip, with a crossguard that extends horizontally and is also rendered in the same blue tones. The handle is short, straight, and colored in shades of brown, suggesting a wooden or leather-wrapped grip, and it ends in a small, blue pommel. The overall construction appears solid and monolithic, with no visible seams or separate parts except for the clear distinction between blade and handle. The surface of the blade has a glossy, crystalline appearance, giving it a gem-like or ice-like quality. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements beyond the color patterning.
description: A pixelated, blue double-edged sword with a brown handle and a glossy, crystalline blade. The design is blocky and stylized, with a distinct crossguard and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: A thin, edge-on view showing the sword as a narrow vertical line with alternating blue and brown segments.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the broad, blue, pixelated blade, crossguard, and brown handle in clear detail.
description_view_2: Another thin, edge-on view similar to view 0, with the sword appearing as a narrow vertical strip.
description_view_3: A rear view nearly identical to the front, showing the same blue blade and brown handle with pixelated styling.
attribute_handle_design: straight, short, blocky, brown, no visible ergonomic features
